title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: Use-After-Free in ICU NumberFormatter
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
A use-after-free vulnerability exists in V8's `Intl.NumberFormat` implementation. The `JSNumberFormat` object stores an `icu_number_formatter` field pointing to a `Managed<LocalizedNumberFormatter>`. The ICU formatter internally holds a raw C++ pointer to this managed obje
